achievements.title: Upsetting The Romans
achievements.description: Defeat the first 8 roman footsoldiers within 20 seconds of starting act 1.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Agitating The Romans
achievements.description: Defeat the first 8 roman footsoldiers within 15 seconds of starting act 1.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Terrify The Romans
achievements.description: Defeat the first 8 roman footsoldiers within 10 seconds of starting act 1.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Tarzan In The Village
achievements.description: Hang from a vine in act 1.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Calculated Vine-ing
achievements.description: Defeat at least 3 roman footsoldiers while hanging from a single vine in act 1.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Get A Room!
achievements.description: Get a kiss from Panacea in act 1.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Get A Tent!
achievements.description: Get a kiss from Panacea in act 2.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: No Wind In Sight
achievements.description: Avoid being caught by the whirlwind in act 2, the deserts of Egypt.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Dogmatix Village Delivery
achievements.description: Use the powerup delivered by Dogmatix in act 1.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Trapdoor Avoider
achievements.description: Complete act 2 without falling down any holes.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: From Above (Asterix)
achievements.description: Defeat at least 2 roman footsoldiers from one single jump attack with Asterix.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: From Below (Asterix)
achievements.description: Defeat at least 2 roman footsoldiers from one single slide attack with Asterix.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: From Above (Obelix)
achievements.description: Defeat at least 2 roman footsoldiers from one single jump bomb attack with Obelix.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Power Punchin' Romans
achievements.description: Defeat at least 3 roman footsoldiers from one single power punch.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Rock Avoider
achievements.description: Avoid being squashed by falling rocks in act 2.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Chariot Mastery: Rank I
achievements.description: Complete the first chariot bonus stage with 6 or more left on the timer.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Chariot Mastery: Rank II
achievements.description: Complete the second chariot bonus stage with 4 or more left on the timer.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Barrel Mastery: Rank I
achievements.description: Complete the first barrel bonus stage with at least 5000 score and 15 or more left on the timer.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Barrel Mastery: Rank II
achievements.description: Complete the second barrel bonus stage with at least 8500 score and 10 or more left on the timer.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: I Ain't No Shark Bait!
achievements.description: Defeat 5 sharks in act 3.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Powerup On The Boat
achievements.description: Use the powerup found on the boat in act 3.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Boat Hole Avoider
achievements.description: Complete act 3 without falling down any holes on the boat.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Tarzan On The Boat
achievements.description: Hang from a vine in act 3.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Ballista Breaker
achievements.description: Destroy the ballista on the boat in act 3.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Dogmatix Mountain Delivery
achievements.description: Use the powerup delivered by Dogmatix in act 4.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Cart Rider
achievements.description: Ride the carts from top of mountan (act 4) down to Panacea without dying once.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Your Ram Is Not Scary
achievements.description: Destroy 3 groups of soldiers with rams at the start of act 5.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: A Powerup In Spain
achievements.description: Use the powerup delivered by Dogmatix in act 5.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Consigue Una Habitacion!
achievements.description: Get a kiss from Panacea in act 5.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Staying On The Carpet
achievements.description: Stay on the carpet while the storm is raging in act 6.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: No Horsing Around
achievements.description: Defeat 5 or more horseriders in act 6.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Dogmatix Indian Delivery
achievements.description: Use the powerup delivered by Dogmatix in act 6.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Village
achievements.description: Complete act 1 by defeating the square formation army.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Village (Express)
achievements.description: Complete act 1 by defeating the square formation army within 2 minutes and 30 seconds.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Egypt
achievements.description: Complete act 2 by defeating Iris.

achievements.title: Britain
achievements.description: Complete act 3 by defeating the slaves on the boat.

achievements.title: Mountain
achievements.description: Complete act 4 by defeating the bandit at the top of the mountain.

achievements.title: Spain
achievements.description: Complete act 5 by defeating the bull in the arena.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: India
achievements.description: Complete act 6 by defeating carpet riding Hoodunnit and Owzat.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Rome
achievements.description: Complete act 7 by defeating the Royal Tiger, Isalubrius, Legionnaires and the Gladiators.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Egypt: Section 1 (Express)
achievements.description: Complete section 1 in act 2 within 1 minute 50 seconds.

achievements.title: Egypt: Section 2 (Express)
achievements.description: Complete section 2 in act 2 within 1 minute 17 seconds.

achievements.title: Egypt: Section 3 (Express)
achievements.description: Complete section 3 in act 2 within 15 seconds.

achievements.title: Egypt: Section 4 (Express)
achievements.description: Complete section 4 in act 2 within 2 minute 10 seconds.

achievements.title: Britain (Express)
achievements.description: Complete act 3 within 3 minutes.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Mountain (Express)
achievements.description: Complete section 1 in act 4 within 3 minutes.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Spain (Express)
achievements.description: Complete section 1 in act 5 within 4 minutes.

achievements.title: Mastered: Hoodunnit and Owzat
achievements.description: Defeat carpet riding Hoodunnit and Owzat without losing a life.

achievements.title: Mastered: Mountain Bandit
achievements.description: Defeat the bandit on the top of the mountain without losing a life.

achievements.title: Mastered: Slaves
achievements.description: Defeat both slaves on the boat without losing a life.

achievements.title: Mastered: Iris
achievements.description: Defeat Iris in Egypt without losing a life.

achievements.title: Mastered: Square Formation Army
achievements.description: Defeat the square formation army in the village without losing a life.

achievements.title: Mastered: Bull
achievements.description: Defeat the bull in the spanish arena without losing a life.

achievements.title: India: Palace (Express)
achievements.description: Complete the last palace section in act 6 within 2 minutes.

achievements.title: Rome: Streets (Express)
achievements.description: Complete the streets section in act 7 within 1 minutes 10 seconds.

achievements.title: Faithful: Asterix
achievements.description: Complete the game using only Asterix.

achievements.title: Faithful: Obelix
achievements.description: Complete the game using only Obelix.

achievements.title: Dogmatix Egyptian Delivery
achievements.description: Use the powerup delivered by Dogmatix in act 2.

achievements.title: All Kisses Are Belong To Us
achievements.description: Get all them sweet kisses from Panacea!

achievements.title: Not Wasting Any Powerups!
achievements.description: Use the powerup in acts 1 through 6.

achievements.title: Continuation Master
achievements.description: Complete the game using 5 or less continues after starting a game!
